title: FlakyClouds
description: This vanilla resource pack replaces the default clouds with a stylized pixelated version, that changes dynamically depending on the weather and time, generated with value noise.
body:
![Sky preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe122ac38639ae0f601bf0793647c1d8d47c38a.png)A vanilla resource pack that replaces the standard clouds with a dynamical pixelated version using core shaders.

Clouds reacts to the weather and day/night changes.

_This is a vanilla resource pack, it doesn't require Optifine, Iris or any other modifications._

Tested on versions:
- 26.1.1 ✔
- 1.21.11 ✔
- 1.21.10 ✔
- 1.21.8 ✔
- 1.21.6 ✔
- 1.21.5 ⨉
- 1.21.4 ⨉
- 1.20.4 ⨉
